_note: Hand-written MOCK code-reviewer output that catches ONLY the N+1 and MISSES the missing index. gradeReviewerCase(...) MUST FAIL (fn=1 for missing-index-1). Demonstrates the grader requires EVERY planted defect to be caught.

findings.title: N+1 query per order in the loop
findings.body: One query per order inside the loop — batch it. (Reviewer stopped here and never looked at the schema, so the missing index on line_items.order_id was missed.)
